query:
SELECT externalId, planName, serviceType, provider, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, customerExternalId,
  (SELECT name FROM customers WHERE externalId = s.customerExternalId) as customerName
FROM services s
WHERE provider = 'SasBoss' 
  AND monthlyCost = 0
  AND (status IS NULL OR status != 'terminated')
  AND customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != ''
ORDER BY planName
LIMIT 60;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute SELECT externalId, planName, serviceType, provider, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue, customerExternalId,
  (SELECT name FROM customers WHERE externalId = s.customerExternalId) as customerName
FROM services s
WHERE provider = 'SasBoss' 
  AND monthlyCost = 0
  AND (status IS NULL OR status != 'terminated')
  AND customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND customerExternalId != ''
ORDER BY planName
LIMIT 60;
